_readme: 1. Drop your images into this folder.
001_subject_a.jpg  ← after shot  (shown first, used as thumbnail)
003_subject_b.jpg  ← before shot (shown last, never the thumbnail)
- Start with 001, 002, 003 … to control display order
- End with _a for AFTER shots, _b for BEFORE shots
- The subject word(s) in the middle are optional but helpful
3. Fill in the fields below and save as project.json
title: Project Title
description: 2-3 sentences describing the scope of work and the result.
materials: Material used (e.g. LVP flooring, cedar, epoxy base coat)
techniques: Skill applied (e.g. tongue & groove installation, color-flake broadcast)
